w:r.w:t: JOBTRANS - PLATFORM TO SUPPORT RECRUITMENT AND SEARCH FOR ONLINE JOBS
Final Release Document
– Danang, November 2024 –

I. Deliverable Package
No.
File
Notes
Group5_JobTrans_DB_final.sql
Database, including both table structures and table data
Group5_JobTrans
_RDS_final.docx
Final RDS (Requirement & Design) Document
Group5_JobTrans
_SDS_final.docx
Final SDS (Design) Document
Group5_JobTrans
_Final Product Backlog.xlsx
Final status for the application functions, which include:
- Function name, feature, roles, function description (changes compared to the original requirements are highlighted)
- In Charge, Planned iteration & Actual iteration
- Final status & note on the update you made
- The links to the SRS & SDS are tracked
Group5_JobTrans
_Issues Report.xlsx
Final issues tracking list of the whole project
Group5_JobTrans_Project_Tracking.xlsx
Final project tracking for list working iterations of the whole project
Other related deliverables:
Tagged source codes: https://github.com/myduyen2004/JobTrans.git
II. Installation Guides
Set up Visual Studio,Git,Apache Netbeans IDE(Recommend Apache Netbeans IDE 17 and jdk-17),SQL Server management studio (Recommend SQL Server management studio 19)
- Create folder and pull all code from Git
- Click to run project
III. User Manual
1. Overview

The JobTrans project was built to meet the growing demand for job search and it is a platform that helps job seekers and employers connect more effectively. According to a survey, many job search systems on the market today do not meet the flexibility and in-depth features for the needs of both job seekers and businesses. The current market situation shows that job seekers need an easy-to-use platform to find jobs that match their skills and desires, while employers want a convenient tool to manage candidate information and track job progress. JobTrans was born with the goal of building a comprehensive solution to optimise the recruitment and job search process, while bringing long-term value to both individual users and businesses.
We encourage you to refer to the following specific sections of this user manual for the detailed instructions on each feature and workflow in this system.
2. User Manual Guide for Guest
2.1. Search Job Post
a) Show the list of jobs.
This is the function to show the list of jobs.
Step 1: Users log into the platform .
Step 2: On the header bar, the user clicks “Việc làm”
b)Search job post
This is the function to search for a job on the list .
Step 1: On the list of job page, click the arrow to the right of "Tất cả danh mục" to display the entire list of job categories.
Step 2: User click on the category of job want to find
2.2. View Employer’s Information
This is the function to view employer’s information
Step 1: Users log into the platform.
Step 2: On the header bar, the user clicks “Nhà tuyển dụng” to show the list of employer.
Figure : Step 2 in
View Employer’s Information
Step 3: User click on employer want to view
Figure : Step 3 inView Employer’s Information
Step 3: Show Employer’s Information
2.3. View Job Post
This is the function to view employer’s information
Step 1: Click job want to view on list of job
2.4. Register
This is the function to register a new account for the system.
Step 1: On the header bar, user click “Đăng nhập/Đăng ký”
Figure : Step 1 in Register
Step 2: Click “Đăng ký” to register a new account
Figure : Step 2 in Register
Step 3: Fill full information on page as name, address, passwork, repasswork and choose role
Figure : Step 3 in Register
Step 4: Click [Đăng ký] button.
Figure : Step 4 in Register
3. User Manual Guide for User
3.1. Login
a) Login by gmail
This is the function to login for the system.
Step 1: On the header bar, user click “Đăng nhập/Đăng ký”
Figure : Step 1 in login by gmail
Step 2: Click Đăng nhập
Figure : Step 2 in login by gmail
Step 3: Enter email address and password
Figure : Step 3 in login by gmail
Step 4: Click Đăng nhập button
Figure : Step 4 in login by gmail
a) Login by google account already logged in
This is the function to login for the system by google
Step 1: On the header bar, user click “Đăng nhập/Đăng ký”
Figure : Step 1 in login by Login by google account already logged in
Step 2: Click Đăng nhập
Figure : Step 2 in login by Login by google account already logged in
Step 3: Click "Đăng nhập bằng google" button
Figure : Step 3 in login by Login by google account already logged in
Step 4: select google account
Figure : Step 4 in login by Login by google account already logged in
Step 5: click continue button
Figure : Step 5 in login by Login by google account already logged in
b) Login by google account never logged in
Step 1: Click” sử dụng một tài khoản khác”
Figure : Step 1 in login by Login by google account never logged in
Step 2: enter email or phone and click next
Figure : Step 2 in login by Login by google account never logged in
Step 3: Enter your password
Figure : Step 3 in login by Login by google account never logged in
Step 4: Click “vâng, đúng là tôi” on your email of google account
Figure : Step 4 in login by Login by google account never logged in
3.2. Forgot Password
This is the function to forget the password to login for the system.
Step 1: On the header bar, user click “Đăng nhập/Đăng ký”
Figure : Step 1 in forgot password
Step 2: Click Đăng nhập to view login table
Figure : Step 2 in forgot password
Step 3: Click “Quên mật khẩu” on login table
Step 4: Enter your email you forgot password
Step 5: Click “Gửi OTP” button to show OTP Page
Step 6: Enter OTP send to your email
Step 7: Click Verify OTP button
Step 8:Enter your new password and click ‘Thay đổi mật khẩu' button.
3.3. Change Password
This is the function to change password
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the user’'s profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Đổi mật khẩu]
Step 4: Fill in the appropriate fields
Step 5: Click “Thay đổi” button
3.4. Edit Profile
This is the function to edit profile
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the user’'s profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Sửa hồ sơ]
Step 4: Enter new profile to form and click “Thay đổi ” button
3.5. Add Money into Wallet
This is the function to add money into wallet
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the user’'s profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Thông tin]
Step 4: Click “ví của tôi” to view wallet page
Step 5: click “Nạp tiền”
Step 6: Enter money to add and payment method, then click “Thanh toán”
Step 7: Choose method payment “Thẻ nội địa và tài khoản ngân hàng”
Step 8: Enter payment account with information:
Ngân hàng
NCB
Số thẻ
Tên chủ thẻ
NGUYEN VAN A
Ngày phát hành
Mật khẩu OTP
3.6. View points & trade history
This is the function to add money into wallet
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the user’'s profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Thông tin]
Step 4: Click “ví của tôi” to view wallet page
Step 5: fill day to search
information history transactions.
3.7. View Profile
This is the function to view profile of user
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the user’'s profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Thông tin]
4. User Manual Guide for Employer
4.1. Create Job Post
This is the function to create a new job.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the employer's profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Thông tin]
Step 4: On [Quản
lí
công việc] in the sidebar, click [Đăng tin tuyển dụng] to display the
create new
post form.
Step 5: Enter job related information into the corresponding fields.
Step 6: After filling in all the information, click on the [Đăng tin tuyển dụng] button. The screen will navigate to the page displaying detailed information of the newly created job.
4.2. View Posted List
This is the function to view the posted
list
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the employer's profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Thông tin]
Step 4: On [Quản
lí
công việc] in the sidebar, click [Các việc đã đăng] to display the posted list.
Step 4.1: Click [Trash 2] icon to open delete confirmation pop-up. Click [Xác nhận] to delete post.
Step 4.2: Click job title to view post detail.
4.3. Update Job Post
This is the function to update the posted job.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the employer's profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Thông tin]
Step 4: On [Quản
lí
công việc] in the sidebar, click [Các việc đã đăng] to display the posted list.
Step 5: Update job post
Method 1: Click the [Edit] icon to navigate to the update job post page.
Method 2: On the job post detail page click [Cập nhật công việc] button.
The screen will display update job post detail:

Step 6: Enter information that you want to update into the corresponding fields. After filling in all the information, click on the [Cập nhật công việc] button. The screen will navigate to the page displaying detailed information of the newly updated job.
4.4. View Applied Seeker List
This is the function to view the applied seeker
list
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the employer's profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Thông tin]
Step 4: On [Quản
lí
công việc] in the sidebar, click [Các việc đã đăng] to display the posted list.
Step 5: Click [Quản lý tuyển dụng] button on thẻ job want to view applied seeker list. The screen will redirect to the applied seeker list page.
4.5. View Applied Seeker’s Information
This is the function to view the applied seekel’s information.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the employer's profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Thông tin]
Step 4: On [Quản
lí
công việc] in the sidebar, click [Các việc đã đăng] to display the posted list.
Step 5: Click [Quản lý tuyển dụng] button on thẻ job want to view applied seeker list. The screen will redirect to the applied seeker list page.
Step 6: Click seeker name to redirect to applied seeker’s information page.
Step 7: Click [Xem CV] to view the seeker's CV.
4.6. Update Interview
This is the function to update the job’s interview.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the employer's profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Thông tin]
Step 4: On [Quản
lí
công việc] in the sidebar, click [Các việc đã đăng] to display the posted list.
Step 5: Click job title to view post detail.
Step 6: On the job post detail page click [Cập nhật phỏng vấn] button. The system will navigate to update the interview page.
Step 7: Enter the required information and click Cập Nhật Lịch Phỏng Vấn]
4.7. Confirm Successful Seeker
This is the function to Confirm Successful
Seeker
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the employer's profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Thông tin]
Step 4: On [Quản
lí
công việc] in the sidebar, click [Các việc đã đăng] to display the posted list.
Step 5: Click [Quản lý tuyển dụng] button on thẻ job want to view applied seeker list. The screen will redirect to the applied seeker list page.
Step 6: Click [Duyệt Đề Nghị] button to move job seekers to the interview waiting round.
Step 6.1: Click [Duyệt Phỏng Vấn] button to confirm successful seeker.
Step 6.2: Click [Trượt Phỏng Vấn] button to to eliminate job seekers from the interview queue.
4.8. Prepay Money For Job
This is the function to prepay money for a job.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the employer's profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Thông tin]
Step 4: On [Quản
lí
công việc] in the sidebar, click [Công việc của tôi] to display the posted list.
Step 5: Click [Trả trước để làm việc] button to navigate to prepay page:
Step 6: Click [Trả trước] button:
Step 6.1: If the amount of wallet is smaller than the amount to be paid, the system will require the employer to top up the wallet.
Step 6.2: After top up money successfully, back to prepay page click [Trả trước] button the screen will display:
4.9. Manage My Job List
This is the function to view my job
list
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the employer's profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Thông tin]
Step 4: On [Quản
lí
công việc] in the sidebar, click [Công việc của tôi] to display my job list.
4.10. Chat
This is the function to cha
t
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the employer's profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Thông tin]
Step 4: On [Quản
lí
công việc] in the sidebar, click [Công việc của tôi] to display my job list.
Step 5: Click the [Chat] button to open the chat screen.
4.11. Manage Progress
This is the function to manage progress.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the employer's profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Thông tin]
Step 4: On [Quản
lí
công việc] in the sidebar, click [Công việc của tôi] to display my job list.
Step 5: Click [quản lý tiến trình] on the job you want to manage progress to navigate to the manage progress page.
4.11.1. Create progress
Step 1: Click [Tạo mới giai đoạn] and full fill the required information.
-Click [Tạo giai đoạn] to create new progress.
Step 2: Click [Trash 2] icon to delete process, click [Eye] icon to view process.
4.11.2. View period result and Comment
Step 1: Click [Xem kết quả] button to view the period result
After click, the screen will display:
Step 2: Give comment and click [Từ chối] to reject result or click [Chấp nhận] to accept result.
4.12. View Final Submission
This is the function to cha
t
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the employer's profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Thông tin]
Step 4: On [Quản
lí
công việc] in the sidebar, click [Công việc của tôi] to display my job list.
Step 5: Click [Xem sản phẩm online đã nộp] to view the final Submission
Click [Hoàn thành] confirm job completely.
4.13. Report Job
This is the function to report
job
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the employer's profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Thông tin]
Step 4: On [Quản
lí
công việc] in the sidebar, click [Công việc của tôi] to display my job list.
Step 5: Click [Khiếu Nại] to navigate to the report page.
Step 6: Enter required information and click [Gửi] button
4.14. Give Feedback
This is the function to give feedback.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as employer
Step 2: On the header bar, click on the employer's profile picture.
Step 3: On the dropdown click [Thông tin]
Step 4: On [Quản
lí
công việc] in the sidebar, click [Công việc của tôi] to display my job list.
Step 5: Click [Đánh giá người tìm việc] to open give feedback pop-up.
Step 6: Enter required information and click [Gửi] button
5. User Manual Guide for Job Seeker
5.1. Manage CV
5.1.1. View CV List
This is the function to view all CVs created at the JobTrans website of a seeker.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Quản lý CV] Button to view all CVs was created.
5.1.2. Create CV
This is the function to create a CV at the JobTrans website of seeker.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Quản lý CV] Button to view all CVs was created.
Step 5: Click the [Tạo CV] button to open the create CV page.
Step 6: Enter information and click [Cập Nhật CV] to create a CV.
5.1.3. Update CV
This is the function to update a CV at the JobTrans website of seeker.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Quản lý CV] Button to view all CVs was created.
Step 5: Click the [Sửa CV] button to open the create CV page.
Step 6: Enter information and click [Cập Nhật CV] to update CV.
5.1.4. View CV
This is the function to view a CV at the JobTrans website of seeker.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Quản lý CV] Button to view all CV was created.
Step 5: Click the [Xem CV] button to view a CV.
5.1.5 Delete CV
This is the function to delete a CV at the JobTrans website of seeker.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Quản lý CV] Button to view all CVs was created.
Step 5: Click the [Xóa CV] button to delete a CV.
5.2. Apply for Job
This is the function to apply for a job from a seeker .
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click job title to open details job page.
Step 3: Enter information of greeting click [Ứng tuyển] button to apply.
5.3. View Applied Job List
This is the function to view all applications for jobs of seeker.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Danh sách các việc đã ứng tuyển] Button to view all applications for jobs.
5.4. Deposit Money for Job
This is the function of a seeker depositing money for a job.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Công việc của tôi] Button to view all applications for jobs.
Step 3: Click [Đặt cọc để làm việc] Button to open confirm page.
Step 4: Click the [Trả trước] Button to deposit money for job.
5.5. Manage My Job List
This is the function to manage all jobs that are working at the JobTrans website.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Công việc của tôi] Button to manage all jobs that are working.
5.6. View Progress
5.6.1. View List Process
This is the function to view all processes on the JobTrans website.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Công việc của tôi] Button to manage all jobs that are working.
Step 5: Click the [Xem tiến trình] button to view all processes of a job.
5.6.2. View Requirement Of A Process
This is the function to seeker view requirements of employers at the JobTrans website.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Công việc của tôi] Button to manage all jobs that are working.
Step 5: Click the [Xem tiến trình] button to view all processes of a job.
Step 6: Click [Xem yêu cầu] to view the requirements of the employer.
5.6.3. Submit Result For A Process
This is the function to seeker to submit the result for the process at the JobTrans website.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Công việc của tôi] Button to manage all jobs that are working.
Step 5: Click the [Xem tiến trình] button to view all processes of a job.
Step 6: Click [Nộp kết quả] to submit the result for the process.
5.6.4. View Feedback Of Result
This is the function to seeker view requirements of employers at the JobTrans website.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Công việc của tôi] Button to manage all jobs that are working.
Step 5: Click the [Xem tiến trình] button to view all processes of a job.
Step 6: Click [Xem] to view the result submitted and feedback of the employer.
5.7. Submit Final Product
5.7.1. Submit Final Product Online
This is the function to submit the online final product for a job at the JobTrans website.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Công việc của tôi] Button to manage all jobs that are working.
Step 5: Click the [Nộp sản phẩm] button to choose the product submission method.
Step 6: Click the [Online] button to upload the product.
Step 7: Click the [Nộp] button to submit a product.
5.7.2. Submit Final Product Offline
This is the function to submit the offline final product for a job at the JobTrans website.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Công việc của tôi] Button to manage all jobs that are working.
Step 5: Click the [Nộp sản phẩm] button to choose the product submission method.
Step 6: Click the [Offline] button to fill in order information.
Step 7: Click the [Gửi thông tin giao hàng] button to submit order information.
5.8. View Final Submission
a)
View Final Submission online
This is the function to report a job at the JobTrans website.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Công việc của tôi] Button to manage all jobs that are working.
Step 5: Click the [Nộp sản phẩm] button
Step 5: Click online to submit online
Step 6: Choose file submit and enter notes, then click “Nộp” button
b)View Final Submission offline
This is the function to report a job at the JobTrans website.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Công việc của tôi] Button to manage all jobs that are working.
Step 5: Click the [Nộp sản phẩm] button
Step 5: Click offline to submit offline
Step 6: Enter information of product
Step 7: Click”Gửi thông tin giao hàng”
5.9. Report Job
This is the function to report a job at the JobTrans website.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Công việc của tôi] Button to manage all jobs that are working.
Step 5: Click the [Khiếu nại] button to fill in the report information.
Step 5: Click the [Gửi] button to send the report to admin to handle
5.10. Give Feedback
This is the function to report a job at the JobTrans website.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Công việc của tôi] Button to manage all jobs that are working.
Step 5: Click the [Khiếu nại] button to fill in the report information.
Step 5: Click the [Gửi] button to send the report to admin to handle
5.11. Chat
This is the function to chat with employer.
Step 1: Users log into the platform as Seeker.
Step 2: Click on the user and click the [Thông tin] button.
Step 3: Click [Quản lý công việc] Button to open taskbar.
Step 4: Click [Công việc của tôi] Button to manage all jobs that are working.
Step 5: Click the [Chat] button to show interface chat.
Step 5: Click the [Send] button or [Enter] on keyboard send a message to the employer.
. User Manual Guide for Admin
6.1. Manage Job Post
6.1.1 Verify job post
This is the function to verify job post at JobTrans platform
Step 1:Login JobTrans platform by role Admin
Step 2:Click on avatar and the system will display pop-up menu as below:
Step 3: Hover and click on “Thông tin”
Step 4 : Admin click on”Quản lý ” on the sidebar and click ”Quản lý bài đăng tuyển” .The system will display as below:
Step 5: Admin click on “Chưa duyệt” button to verify job post.
6.1.2.View job report
This is the function to
view job report
at JobTrans platform
Step 1:Login JobTrans platform by role Admin
Step 2:Click on avatar and the system will display pop-up menu as below:
Step 3: Hover and click on “Thông tin”
Step 4 : Admin click on”Quản lý ” on the sidebar and click ”Quản lý bài đăng tuyển” .The system will display as below:
Step 5: Admin click on “Xem chi tiết” button and the system will display the detail of job post :
Step 6: Admin click on “Chi tiết khiếu nại” button :
6.1.3.Pay salary
This is the function to pay salary at JobTrans platform
Step 1:Login JobTrans platform by role Admin
Step 2:Click on avatar and the system will display pop-up menu as below:
Step 3: Hover and click on “Thông tin”
Step 4 : Admin click on”Quản lý ” on the sidebar and click ”Quản lý bài đăng tuyển” .The system will display as below:
Step 5: Admin click on “Xem chi tiết” and the system will display as below:
Step 6: Admin click on “trả lương” and the system will notify the successful message or failed message
6.1.4 Refund the deposit
This is the function to refund the deposit at JobTrans platform
Step 1:Login JobTrans platform by role Admin
Step 2:Click on avatar and the system will display pop-up menu as below:
Step 3: Hover and click on “Thông tin”
Step 4 : Admin click on”Quản lý ” on the sidebar and click ”Quản lý bài đăng tuyển” .The system will display as below:
Step 5: Admin click on “Xem chi tiết” and the system will display as below:
Step 6: Admin roll down and click on “Hoàn tiền” and the system will notify the successful message or failed message.
6.1.5 View list candidate for job
This is the function to view a list of candidates for a job at JobTrans platform.
Step 1:Login JobTrans platform by role Admin
Step 2:Click on avatar and the system will display pop-up menu as below:
Step 3: Hover and click on “Thông tin”
Step 4 : Admin click on”Quản lý ” on the sidebar and click ”Quản lý bài đăng tuyển” .The system will display as below:
Step 5: Admin click on “Xem chi tiết” and the system will display as below:
Step 6:Admin click on “Danh sách ứng tuyển” button and the system will display as below:
6.1.6 Update the status of detail report job
This is the function to update the status of detail report job at JobTrans platform.
Step 1:Login JobTrans platform by role Admin
Step 2:Click on avatar and the system will display pop-up menu as below:
Step 3: Hover and click on “Thông tin”
Step 4 : Admin click on”Quản lý ” on the sidebar and click ”Quản lý bài đăng tuyển” .The system will display as below:
Step 5: Admin click on “Xem chi tiết” and the system will display as below:
Step 6:Admin click on “Chi tiết khiếu nại” button and the system will display as below:
Step 7: Admin click on “Xử lý khiếu nại” button to update status of report job into “Đã xử lý” or click on “Từ chối xử lý” to update status of report job into “Từ chối khiếu nại” button.
6.1.7 Create new shipment order to GHTK
This is the function to update the status of detail report job at JobTrans platform.
Step 1: Login JobTrans platform by role Admin
Step 2:Click on avatar and the system will display pop-up menu as below:
Step 3: Hover and click on “Thông tin”
Step 4 : Admin click on”Quản lý ” on the sidebar and click ”Quản lý bài đăng tuyển” .The system will display as below:
Step 5: Admin click on “Xem chi tiết” and the system will display as below:
Step 6:Admin click on “Sản phẩm Offline” button and the system will display as below:
Step 7: Admin click on “Tạo đơn GHTK” button to create new shipment to GHTK system.
Step 8: View Status Of shipment order:
6.2. Manage User
6.2.1 View user list
This is the function to ban user at JobTrans platform.
Step 1: In the sidebar,Admin click on “quản lý” and then, click on click on “Quản lý người dùng”. The system will display as below:
6.2.2 Ban user
This is the function to ban user at JobTrans platform.
Step 1: In the sidebar,Admin click on “quản lý” and then, click on click on “Quản lý người dùng”. The system will display as below:
Step 2:Admin click on “Chặn” button and the system will display the pop-up confirmation:
6.2.3 Unban user
This is the function to unban user at JobTrans platform.
Step 1: In the sidebar,Admin click on “quản lý” and then, click on click on “Quản lý người dùng”. The system will display as below:
Step 2: Admin click on “Chọn tiêu chí lọc” button and the system will display the pop-up as below:
Step 3: Admin click on “Đã chặn” button and click on “Gỡ chặn” to unban user :
6.2.4 View user’s profile
This is the function to view user’s profile at JobTrans platform.
Step 1: In the sidebar,Admin click on “quản lý” and then, click on click on “Quản lý người dùng”. The system will display as below:
Step 2: Admin click on “Xem chi tiết” button and the system will display as below:
6.2.5 View report user
This is the function to view report
user’s profile at JobTrans platform.
Step 1: In the sidebar,Admin click on “quản lý” and then, click on click on “Quản lý người dùng”. The system will display as below:
Step 2: Admin click on “Xem chi tiết” button and the system will display as below:
Step 3: Admin click on “Xem chi tiết khiếu nại” and the system will display as below:
6.3. Manage Dashboard
View dashboard
This is the function to view dashboard at JobTrans platform.
Step 1:Login JobTrans platform by role Admin
Step 2:Click on avatar and the system will display pop-up menu as below:
Step 3: Hover and click on “Thông tin”
Step 4: On sidebar,Admin click on Dashboard and the system will display as below :
